name: bare pipeline marker
code:
// pipeline
export function main() {}

name: pipeline keyword with trailing text is not a marker
code:
// pipeline for billing
export function main() {}

name: asset triggers across kinds, duplicates deduped
code:
-- pipeline
-- on datatable://main/orders
-- on s3://bucket/raw.parquet
-- on ducklake://lake/events
-- on datatable://main/orders
SELECT 1;

name: native trigger markers
code:
# pipeline
# on kafka
# on schedule
# on data_upload
print(1)

name: native keyword must be a whole word and end the line
partitioned daily with options
partitioned dynamic requires key, quoted values parse
code:
// partitioned dynamic key="customer id"
export function main() {}

name: partitioned with unknown kind is rejected
code:
// partitioned fortnightly
export function main() {}

name: partitioned keyword does not match partition prefix
code:
// partition daily
export function main() {}

name: freshness and tag, first value wins on duplicates
code:
# pipeline
# freshness 1h
# freshness 2h
# tag heavy
# tag light
print(1)

name: retry with count and delay
retry count only
code:
// retry 2
export function main() {}

name: retry zero or malformed count is rejected
annotations only count inside comments
code:
on datatable://main/raw
pipeline
const s = 'on s3://bucket/x'
export function main() {}

name: partition token preserved in trigger path
leading whitespace and mixed comment prefixes
on with empty or unparseable spec is ignored
materialize managed (default) with merge key
materialize scd2 via history flag with key, track and deletes=close
materialize scd2 keyword alias with key only (track all non-key cols)
code:
// materialize scd2 ducklake://analytics/dim key=id
SELECT 1;

name: materialize key without history is plain merge (SCD1, not scd2)
code:
// materialize ducklake://analytics/dim key=id
SELECT 1;

name: materialize manual escape hatch, first value wins
materialize default-syntax shorthand with append
code:
// materialize ducklake append
export function main() {}

name: materialize manual with no target is dropped
code:
// materialize manual
export function main() {}

name: data_test built-ins accumulate in order
code:
-- pipeline
-- materialize ducklake://analytics/orders key=order_id
-- data_test unique order_id
-- data_test not_null user_id
-- data_test accepted_values status = paid,pending,refunded
-- data_test relationships user_id -> datatable://prod/users.id
SELECT 1;

name: data_test accepted_values strips quotes and spacing
code:
# data_test accepted_values kind = "a b", 'c' ,d
print(1)

name: data_test custom escape hatch is a script path
code:
// data_test f/tests/orders_amount_sane
export function main() {}

name: data_test relationships with ducklake shorthand target
code:
// data_test relationships sku -> ducklake://warehouse/dim_products.sku
SELECT 1;

name: malformed data_test lines are dropped fail-safe
ci test annotation is not a data test
column lineage maps output columns to upstream sources
column lineage keeps duplicate input refs (dedup is a view concern)
code:
// column total <- ducklake://warehouse/orders.amount, ducklake://warehouse/orders.amount
SELECT 1;

name: column lineage keeps schema-qualified table, drops malformed refs
bare macros marker
code:
// macros
CREATE MACRO dbl(a) AS a * 2;

name: macros with trailing prose is not a marker
code:
// macros are defined below
CREATE MACRO dbl(a) AS a * 2;

name: macros marker with sql comment prefix
use accumulates in order and dedups
use requires a slashed single token
use stops at first code line
